## Kekkon Suru tte, Hontou desu ka
### *зөҗе©ҡгҒҷгӮӢгҒЈгҒҰ, жң¬еҪ“гҒ§гҒҷгҒӢ*
### *365 Days to the Wedding*
___
### Video - **AV1 1080p 10-bit**
- Source: [[SubsPlease] CR WEB-DL H.264](https://nyaa.si/view/1905261)
- [**SVT-AV1-PSY** v2.3.0](https://github.com/gianni-rosato/svt-av1-psy) + **[Av1an](https://github.com/master-of-zen/Av1an/)** + [**Auto-boost algorithm** v2.5](https://github.com/trixoniisama/auto-boost-algorithm) + [**Grav1synth**](https://github.com/rust-av/grav1synth)
- ```--crf 26 --preset 4 --tune 3 --enable-dlf 2 --film-grain 0 --enable-tf 0 --scm 0 --sharpness 4 --frame-luma-bias 100``` + FGS: ```--iso 200 --chroma```

[пјҘгғҶгғ¬] 
2024е№ҙ11жңҲ28ж—Ҙ еҚҲеүҚ9:10 гҖң еҚҲеүҚ9:20 (10еҲҶ)
гҖҢпј‘дәәпј‘еҸ°з«Ҝжң«гӮ’жҙ»з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢжҠҖгҖҚгӮ’гғҮгғјгғўгғій–ЈдёӢгҒҢдјқжҺҲгҒ—гҒҰгҒҸгӮҢгӮӢгӮ·гғӘгғјгӮәгҖӮпј’жң¬зӣ®гҒҜгғҮгӮёгӮҝгғ«гғӣгғҜгӮӨгғҲгғңгғјгғүгҒ§е…ұеҗҢз·ЁйӣҶгҒ—гҒӘгҒҢгӮүгҖҒгӮ°гғ«гғјгғ—гҒ§иҖғгҒҲгӮ’гҒҫгҒЁгӮҒгӮӢжҙ»еӢ•гҒ«жҢ‘жҲҰгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

	гҖҢпј‘дәәпј‘еҸ°з«Ҝжң«гӮ’жҙ»з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢжҠҖгҖҚгӮ’гғҮгғјгғўгғій–ЈдёӢгҒҢдјқжҺҲгҒ—гҒҰгҒҸгӮҢгӮӢпј“жң¬гӮ·гғӘгғјгӮәгҖӮпј’жң¬зӣ®гҒ§гҒҜгҖҢе…ұеҗҢз·ЁйӣҶгҒ§иҖғгҒҲгӮ’гҒҫгҒЁгӮҒгӮӢгҖҚж–№жі•гӮ’зҙ№д»ӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгғҮгӮёгӮҝгғ«гғӣгғҜгӮӨгғҲгғңгғјгғүгӮ’дҪҝгҒҶгҒЁгҖҒе…Ёе“ЎгҒ®ж„ҸиҰӢгӮ’иҰӢгҒӘгҒҢгӮүгҖҒж•ҙзҗҶгҒ—гҒҹгӮҠи©ұгҒ—еҗҲгҒЈгҒҹгӮҠгҒ§гҒҚгӮӢгҒ®гҒ§гҒЁгҒҰгӮӮдҫҝеҲ©гҖӮгҒ§гӮӮе…ұеҗҢз·ЁйӣҶгҒ§гӮ°гғ«гғјгғ—гҒ®иҖғгҒҲгӮ’гҒҫгҒЁгӮҒгӮӢгҒ«гҒҜгҖҒеӨ§дәӢгҒӘгғқгӮӨгғігғҲгҒҢпј“гҒӨгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮеӯҗгҒ©гӮӮгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®еӨұж•—дҫӢгӮ’гӮӮгҒЁгҒ«гҖҒдҪҝгҒ„ж–№гҒ®гғ«гғјгғ«дҪңгӮҠгӮ„зӣ®зҡ„гҒ«гҒӮгӮҸгҒӣгҒҰжғ…е ұгӮ’дёҰгҒ№жӣҝгҒҲгӮӢгӮігғ„гӮ’еӯҰгҒігҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

Tanya Degurechaff is a young soldier infamous for predatorial-like ruthlessness and an uncanny, tactical aptitude, earning her the nickname of the "Devil of the Rhine." Underneath her innocuous appearance, however, lies the soul of a man who challenged Being X, the self-proclaimed God, to a battle of witsвҖ”which resulted in him being reincarnated as a little girl into a world of magical warfare. Hellbent on defiance, Tanya resolves to ascend the ranks of her country's military as it slowly plunges into world war, with only Being X proving to be the strongest obstacle in recreating the peaceful life she once knew. title: [Tenrai-Sensei] Delicious in Dungeon (Season 1) [BD][1080p][HEVC 10bit x265][Dual Audio] Dungeon Meshi
description:
## Synopsis
Adventuring knight Laios Touden leads a small party through a seemingly endless dungeon, a subterranean maze full of dangerous monsters and precarious traps. Through the use of advanced magic, an explorer can sometimes be resurrected, allowing them to learn from past mistakes and give traversing the dungeon another go. However, when a powerful dragon eats Falin, Laios' spellcasting sister, she sends her brother and his companions back to the beginning to save them from permanent ends.

Though strapped for cash and equipment, Laios resolves to fight his way through the dungeon and rescue Falin before she can be digested by the dragon. Despite some of Laios' allies abandoning him, two remain by his side: elven mage Marcille Donato and halfling locksmith Chilchuck Tims. Due to their lack of funds, the party faces the daunting prospect of starving before being able to complete their quest. However, they find salvation in Senshi, a dwarven warrior with a penchant for cooking and safely eating defeated monsters.

With Senshi's culinary expertise, Laios and his companions struggle through the dungeon while learning about gourmet diningвҖ”and each otherвҖ”along the way.

description:
## 4k Edition 

[![4k](https://i.ibb.co/0VbJX34/4k-logo.png)](https://1337x.to/torrent/6276520/Tenrai-Sensei-Kaiju-No-8-BD-4k-2160p-HEVC-10bit-x265-Dual-Audio-Kaijuu-8-gou/)

-------------------------------------------------
## Synopsis
After the destruction of their hometown, childhood friends Kafka Hibino and Mina Ashiro make a pact to become officers in the Defense ForceвҖ”a militarized organization tasked with protecting Japan from colossal monsters known as "kaijuu." Decades later, the 32-year-old Kafka has all but given up on his dreams of heroism. Instead, he cleans up the remains of the slaughtered kaijuu after they are defeated by valiant soldiersвҖ”including Mina, who has successfully achieved their shared goal.

Upon meeting his new coworker, Reno Ichikawa, Kafka faces a mirror of his past self: an ambitious young man whose one desire is to fight as a member of the Defense Force. Unfortunately, the two are soon involved in a freak encounter with a rogue kaijuu. Though Kafka demonstrates his innate heroic nature and rescues Reno from certain doom, he is left gravely injured.

While both men recover in a hospital, Kafka is seemingly attacked by another one of the beasts. As a result, he gains the ability to transform into a humanoid kaijuu with the strength and powers of the massive monsters menacing Japan. Dubbed "Kaijuu No. 8" by the military, Kafka resolves to use his newfound gifts for the greater good. Tied together by mutual respect, Kafka and Reno set out to join warriors like Mina at the forefront of the Defense Force.

description:
## 4k Edition 

[![4k](https://i.ibb.co/0VbJX34/4k-logo.png)](https://1337x.to/torrent/6276518/Tenrai-Sensei-Frieren-Beyond-Journey-s-End-Season-1-OVAs-BD-4k-2160p-HEVC-10bit-x265-Dual-Audio-Sousou-no-Frieren/)

-------------------------------------------------

## Synopsis
During their decade-long quest to defeat the Demon King, the members of the hero's partyвҖ”Himmel himself, the priest Heiter, the dwarf warrior Eisen, and the elven mage FrierenвҖ”forge bonds through adventures and battles, creating unforgettable precious memories for most of them.

However, the time that Frieren spends with her comrades is equivalent to merely a fraction of her life, which has lasted over a thousand years. When the party disbands after their victory, Frieren casually returns to her "usual" routine of collecting spells across the continent. Due to her different sense of time, she seemingly holds no strong feelings toward the experiences she went through.

As the years pass, Frieren gradually realizes how her days in the hero's party truly impacted her. Witnessing the deaths of two of her former companions, Frieren begins to regret having taken their presence for granted; she vows to better understand humans and create real personal connections. Although the story of that once memorable journey has long ended, a new tale is about to begin.

title: Swallowed.Star.(Tunshi.Xingkong).1080p.10Bit.S01E001-S04E143.x265.HEVC.Donghua.EngSoftSubs.Edited.for.Content.(EFC)
description:
![swallow](https://i1.wp.com/wallpaperaccess.com/full/9026117.jpg?ssl=1)

**Description According to [MAL](https://myanimelist.net/anime/44218/Tunshi_Xingkong)**

>One day, an unknown RR virus appeared on earth, and the world fell into disaster. Infected animals mutate into frightening and massively attacking monsters. When humans face destruction, they build walls and build base cities as the last bastion of man. The trials experienced by mankind during this period of time are called the вҖңPeriod of Nirvana.вҖқ In extreme living environments, human power is also gradually advancing and evolving, and martial arts are emerging, and human power is qualitatively increasing compared to before. And the best of them is called the Warriors. Luo Feng, 18, also aspires to be one of them. Currently, she will take the college entrance exam and face a choice at a crossroads in her life, but suddenly a monster attack affects the trajectory of her life. Under the threat of powerful monsters, the inhabitants of the city are in danger, but the military is powerless. Only one soldier stood up and maintained the security of the base city. Luo Feng is infected by a warrior force, and secretly he decides to become a fighter to protect his loved ones. This is the beginning of everything, the starting point of Luo FengвҖҷs journey as a martial artist, and also the beginning of his legendary life. Luo Feng aspires to be a martial artist, but the road ahead is not smooth. The first thing he has to deal with is the influence of the outside environment that is not visible to him. Luo FengвҖҷs familyвҖҷs condition was alarming and life was difficult, his parents could not provide more help and could only rely on his own efforts. Ultimately, under constant hard work, Luo Feng continues to explore his own potential and is recognized by his increased abilities and self-improvement. Not only that, Luo Feng not only shouldered the burden of supporting the family, but also joined other justice fighters to face evil monsters to protect the homeland of mankind and for the better survival and development of mankind. In a desperate doomsday situation, can Luo Feng and the other soldiers drive away the monsters and successfully protect the human world?

**NOTES from Encoder**
>We went the extra mile this time and **STARTED FRESH** to follow a Bullit Sect member suggestion to incorporate the E001-E085 non HC subtitles.  This archive is a combo of E001-E085 that was done by VoidVampire with no hard chinese subs and then E086-E143 using the AX-Corrected 2160p masters for the Maxine 1080p downsample engine and EFC.
>
>This archive has gone back to 30fps.
>
>The one thing we will never compromise however at Bullit Sect is the video quality.  Upon ***extensive evaluation of the AX-Corrected 1080p THIS TIME I just couldnt endure the quality of the 1080p***. A full 18 minutes video on uberpopular Swallowed Star needs 7-9Mbit. When we tested the quality of taking the 2160p videos and encoded with NVIDIA 2160p->>1080p Maxine oversampled downsize filter personally the quality difference was simply overwhelming.
>
>>Just fyi S03E70 had a tragic subtitle problem frankly the subtitles timing went bananas.  So I had to use the HC subs instead for that  episode.
>
>I hope you find this archive as absolutely beautiful as we did.  This is one time HBR was totally called for.  Enjoy one of our favorite series.

***WHAT ARE EFC ARCHIVES?***
>Edited For Content archives are all MKV format and have removed all intro and exit music (except Episode 001 of each season is left unedited for fans of that music).
>
>Also removed are food adverts, drink adverts, little figurines of anime characters adverts, Station Identification, Production House Logos, future episode previews and previous episode recaps.  All this digital EXCESS is REMOVED so the ACTUAL STORY can come through WITHOUT all the background noise and fast forwarding interruptions.
>
>EFC archives are structured such that you can watch hours and hours of uninterrupted anime or donghua.  EFC always focuses on bringing the story to the front and leave all the waste out.

**Please [SEED](https://media.tenor.com/3A5W_Dw_Xz0AAAAi/please-seed-until-the-earth-explosion.gif) to keep the files alive**

title: Dragon Prince Yuan / Yuan Zun (Scanlated) (ManhuaPlus) (Void) | Completed
description:
#### **Dragon Prince Yuan / Yuan Zun**
___

**Translation by: `ManhuaPlus`**

**Ripped from: https://manhuaplus.com/manga/yuan-zun01/**

I had to write the scraping script for this. The tools I had were using manhuaplus.org as source and not .com. The .org website also had 3 chapters missing, this was the main reason which made me script it actually lol.
Joined and fixed 0.1, 0.5, 0.6 chapters. I used script for everything. I cross-verified the sequence so there shouldn't be any issue, but please report if there's any.

title: мҡ°мЈјмҶҢл…„л§ҲлҘҙмҠӨ | Jetter Mars Korean Dub VHSrip
description:
These were sent to me by a video collector in Korea. The "reconstructed" version uses video from Amazon Prime, which is surprisingly higher quality than the DVD. I edited these together, doing my best to retain all the edits made to hide Japanese text, as well as adding korean text where necessary. I'm no professional editor, however, so these censored clips do not look too great. (Although, it seems that the person originally editing out text was no professional either, hahaha) The opening and ending do not have Korean subtitles like the original, but in the extras folder is the opening with korean subtitles in the Substation Alpha format. 
This is the Korean VHS home release of the show titled "Astroboy Mars". Out there somewhere is the KBS dub which aired on television in Korea, titled "Jetboy Mars". The home release keeps the opening theme song to Jetboy Mars, but everything else is different. Only the first 12 episodes made it to home release in Korea, but most of the original episodes were dubbed and aired on KBS in Korea.

title: Trails to Oishii TokyoгҖҖгӮҜгӮЁ
description:
Trails to Oishii TokyoгҖҖгӮҜгӮЁ
[BS] 
2024е№ҙ11жңҲ28ж—Ҙ еҚҲеүҚ0:05 гҖң еҚҲеүҚ0:35 (30еҲҶ)
йЈҹгҒ®йғҪгғ»жқұдә¬гҒ«йӣҶгҒҫгӮӢйЈҹжқҗгҒ®йӯ…еҠӣгӮ’зҙ№д»ӢгҒҷгӮӢгҖҢпјҙпҪ’пҪҒпҪүпҪҢпҪ“гҖҖпҪ”пҪҸгҖҖпјҜпҪүпҪ“пҪҲпҪүпҪүгҖҖпјҙпҪҸпҪӢпҪҷпҪҸгҖҚгҖӮд»ҠеӣһгҒ®гғҶгғјгғһгҒҜгҖҢгӮҜгӮЁгҖҚгҖӮ

	гҖҢгӮҜгӮЁгҖҚгҒҜгҖҒдҪ“й•·пј‘пј•пјҗгӮ»гғігғҒгҖҒйҮҚгҒ•пј•пјҗпј«пҪҮгҒ«гӮӮгҒӘгӮӢж·ұжө·йӯҡгҒ§гҖҒгҒқгҒ®еёҢе°‘жҖ§гҒӢгӮүгҖҢе№»гҒ®йӯҡгҖҚгҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҖӮе‘ігӮӮж јеҲҘгҒ§гҖҒзү№гҒ«еҶ…иҮ“гҒӢгӮүйӘЁгҒҫгҒ§дҪҷгҒҷжүҖгҒӘгҒҸе‘ігӮҸгҒҲгӮӢйҚӢж–ҷзҗҶгҒҜзө¶е“ҒпјҒгҖҖе№ёйҒӢгӮ’е‘јгҒ¶зёҒиө·гҒ®гҒ„гҒ„йӯҡгҒЁгӮӮиЁҖгӮҸгӮҢгҖҒдјқзөұиЎҢдәӢгӮ„зҘӯгӮҠгҒ«гҒҜж¬ гҒӢгҒӣгҒӘгҒ„еӯҳеңЁгҒ гҖӮе’ҢжӯҢеұұзңҢгҒ§гҖҒжңӘжқҘгҒ«еҗ‘гҒ‘гҒҹйӨҠж®–гҒ®еҸ–гӮҠзө„гҒҝгӮ’еҸ–жқҗгҒ—гҖҒз”Јең°гҒӘгӮүгҒ§гҒҜгҒ®гҖҢгӮҜгӮЁгҒҘгҒҸгҒ—ж–ҷзҗҶгҖҚгӮ’е ӘиғҪгҒҷгӮӢгҖӮ

**РһРҝРёСҒР°РҪРёРө:**
РҹСҖРҫРҙРҫР»Р¶РөРҪРёРө РҝСҖРёРәР»СҺСҮРөРҪРёР№ РҘР°РҙР·РёРјРө РқР°РіСғРјРҫ, СӮСҖРөСӮРёР№ СҒРөР·РҫРҪ!
РЎРөРјРҪР°РҙСҶР°СӮРёР»РөСӮРҪРёР№ РҘР°РҙР·РёРјРө РқР°РіСғРјРҫ вҖ” СӮРёРҝРёСҮРҪСӢР№ РҫСӮР°РәСғ. Р•РіРҫ Р¶РёР·РҪСҢ СҒРҫСҒСӮРҫРёСӮ РёР· РҪРҫСҮРҪСӢС… РҝРҫСҒРёРҙРөР»РҫРә Р·Р° РёРіСҖР°РјРё Рё РјРёСҖРҪРҫРіРҫ СҒРҪР° Р·Р° РҝР°СҖСӮРҫР№ РІРҫ РІСҖРөРјСҸ СҲРәРҫР»СҢРҪСӢС… Р·Р°РҪСҸСӮРёР№. РқРҫ РҫРҙРҪР°Р¶РҙСӢ РІСҒС‘ РјРөРҪСҸРөСӮСҒСҸ: РҘР°РҙР·РёРјРө РІРјРөСҒСӮРө СҒРҫ РІСҒРөРј СҒРІРҫРёРј РәР»Р°СҒСҒРҫРј РҝРҫРҝР°РҙР°РөСӮ РІ РҝР°СҖР°Р»Р»РөР»СҢРҪСӢР№ С„СҚРҪСӮРөР·РёР№РҪСӢР№ РјРёСҖ. РўР°Рј РёС… РІСҒСӮСҖРөСҮР°СҺСӮ РәР°Рә РіРөСҖРҫРөРІ Рё РҪРөРјРөРҙР»РөРҪРҪРҫ РІСӢРҙР°СҺСӮ РәРІРөСҒСӮ: СҒРҝР°СҒСӮРё СҮРөР»РҫРІРөСҮРөСҒСӮРІРҫ РҫСӮ РІСӢРјРёСҖР°РҪРёСҸ. РһРҙРҪР°РәРҫ РІР»Р°Р¶РҪР°СҸ РјРөСҮСӮР° РҫСӮР°РәСғ РҝСҖРөРІСҖР°СүР°РөСӮСҒСҸ РҙР»СҸ РҘР°РҙР·РёРјРө РІ РәРҫСҲРјР°СҖ: РІСҒРө РөРіРҫ СҒРҫСғСҮРөРҪРёРәРё РҝРҫР»СғСҮР°СҺСӮ РҝРҫСҮСӮРё РұРҫР¶РөСҒСӮРІРөРҪРҪСӢРө СҒРҝРҫСҒРҫРұРҪРҫСҒСӮРё, РІ СӮРҫ РІСҖРөРјСҸ РәР°Рә РәР»Р°СҒСҒ РҘР°РҙР·РёРјРө В«СҒРёРҪРөСҖРіРёСҒСӮВ» РёРјРөРөСӮ Р»РёСҲСҢ РҫРҙРёРҪ РҪР°РІСӢРә вҖ” СӮСҖР°РҪСҒРјСғСӮР°СҶРёСҺ. РһСҒРјРөРёРІР°РөРјСӢР№ Рё СғРҪРёР¶Р°РөРјСӢР№ СҒРІРҫРёРјРё РұСӢРІСҲРёРјРё РҫРҙРҪРҫРәР»Р°СҒСҒРҪРёРәР°РјРё Р·Р° СҒР»Р°РұРҫСҒСӮСҢ, РҘР°РҙР·РёРјРө РІСҒРәРҫСҖРө РІРҝР°РҙР°РөСӮ РІ РҫСӮСҮР°СҸРҪРёРө. РЎРјРҫР¶РөСӮ Р»Рё РҫРҪ РІСӢР¶РёСӮСҢ РІ РҫРҝР°СҒРҪРҫРј, РҪР°СҒРөР»С‘РҪРҪРҫРј РјРҫРҪСҒСӮСҖР°РјРё Рё РҙРөРјРҫРҪР°РјРё РјРёСҖРө, РҫРұР»Р°РҙР°СҸ Р»РёСҲСҢ СҒРёР»РҫР№ РҝСҖРҫСҒР»Р°РІР»РөРҪРҪРҫРіРҫ РәСғР·РҪРөСҶР° Рё СҖРөРјРөСҒР»РөРҪРҪРёРәР°? Р’Рҫ РІСҖРөРјСҸ СҒРІРҫРөРіРҫ РҝСғСӮРөСҲРөСҒСӮРІРёСҸ РҫРҪ РІСҒСӮСҖРөСҮР°РөСӮСҒСҸ СҒ Р·Р°РәР»СҺСҮРөРҪРҪРҫР№ РІ СӮСҺСҖСҢРјСғ РІР°РјРҝРёСҖСҲРөР№ Р®СҚ (323 РіРҫРҙР°, РұСӢР»Р° РҫРұСҖР°СүРөРҪР° РІ РІР°РјРҝРёСҖР° РҙРөРІСҒСӮРІРөРҪРҪРёСҶРөР№-Р»РҫР»РөР№, Р° РІР°РјРҝРёСҖСҒРәР°СҸ СҖРөРіРөРҪРөСҖР°СҶРёСҸ вҖңРә РјРҫРјРөРҪСӮСғ РҫРұСҖР°СүРөРҪРёСҸвҖқ - РҙР°РөСӮ Р·Р°РҪРёРјР°СӮРөР»СҢРҪСӢР№ СҚС„С„РөРәСӮ!), Р° РҝРҫР·Р¶Рө Рә РҪРөРјСғ РҝСҖРёСҒРҫРөРҙРёРҪСҸСҺСӮСҒСҸ СғСҲР°СҒСӮСӢР№ РЁРё, РәСҖРҫР»РёСҮРёР№ РҙСҖР°РәРҫРҪ Рё РҙСҖСғРіРёРө. Р§СӮРҫ Р¶РҙРөСӮ РөРіРҫ РҪР° РіР»СғРұРёРҪРө Рё СҒРјРҫР¶РөСӮ Р»Рё РҫРҪ РІСӢРұСҖР°СӮСҢСҒСҸ Рё РІСӢР¶РёСӮСҢ?

**Р”РҫРҝРҫР»РҪРёСӮРөР»СҢРҪР°СҸ РёРҪС„РҫСҖРјР°СҶРёСҸ:**

description:
|[![Banner](https://artworks.thetvdb.com/banners/v4/series/434310/banners/67068e9fc657f.jpg)](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt32524882)|
|:-:|
|*Jill SavelleвҖ”fiancГ©e of the crown prince Gerald de Kleitos and known as the "Lady Goddess of War"вҖ”is being hunted down by the same country she swore to protect. Betrayed by her betrothed, she is framed as a traitor and imprisoned. In her last moments, Jill is filled with regret, but just as death approaches, she awakens six years in the past. This time, she will not be a mere pawn.  Now as a 10-year-old girl, Jill resolves to escape her imminent engagement to the prince. To this end, she jokingly professes her love to the 19-year-old dragon emperor Hades Theos Rave, who will one day stain the land in blood due to madness. But against all expectations, he accepts!  In contrast to the tyrant from Jill's memories, the Hades of this time is a kind albeit unfortunate emperor. Can Jill prevent Hades from descending down the same dark, villainous road, or is he bound to an inevitable future?*|

title: [Shimai] Gotoubun no Hanayome~ (The Quintessential Quintuplets~) (WEB 1080p EAC3)
description:
Update: [Animorphs has released an even better version - with improved subtitles, timing, typesetting, and a better encode.](https://nyaa.si/view/1905966)

Knowing my luck, now that I've put in the effort to sub this, Crunchyroll will probably release this soon.

I got tired of waiting for Crunchyroll's slow ass, and the currently available subs for these specials were pretty garbage, so I decided to just do it myself, using the Japanese closed captions. A few lines were taken from the manga when I needed to, but otherwise most of it is my own translation. Also has some amateur typesetting. These should be a vast improvement from B-Global and Aitakatta's subs.

Video and audio are from Amazon. Feel free to use these in your own releases, although I ask you credit me unless you're making major typesetting/translation changes.

[Screenshots, DDLs, subs & attachments-only download, and mediainfo, courtesy of AnimeTosho](https://animetosho.org/view/shimai-gotoubun-no-hanayome-quintessential-quintuplets-web.n1904778)

Use mpv/an mpv-based player. Any issues reported on another player like VLC will be ignored.

title: [Team ONIBE] Love Live! School Idol Musical the DRAMA - Episode 01 [E86B62BD].mkv
description:
![](https://i.imgur.com/UDsSdYC.jpeg"")


Starting today, we will be releasing subs for School Idol Musical: The Drama! We're excited to help bring this critical piece of Love Live! lore to a worldwide audience, after being confined to Japanese stages for two years.

The screenplay for this drama is being helmed by the original scriptwriter, director, and choreographer for the musical, Kishimoto Kouki, ensuring that any added material not seen on stage won't feel out of place. Please enjoy the story from the musical and more as we take a peek into Love Live! history!


**Credits:**
TL: **Umeko**
QC:  **arbshortcake**, **PokГ©FanOne**
TS: **Dantalian**
Source/Encode: **AirCookiee**


**FAQ**

***Can I have your permission to use your subtitle files to re-translate to X language?***

Yes, you can use mkvextract to extract out the necessary files, or download the subfiles directly. Please give credit where appropriate.

***I see a bunch of weird video/subtitle issues.***

Use the latest version of mpv instead.

- OP and ED lyrics edited to better reflect their meaning
- OP credits translated and typeset
- Glind changed to Gurindian to reflect the "donguri" pun origin 
- Daimao (еӨ§йӯ”зҺӢ) swapped from "Supreme Demon King" to "Great Demon King" for series consistency 
- "Neva" changed to "Neba" to match the traditional rendering of гғҚгғҗ (зІҳ - Sticky)
- "Kempeitai" (жҶІе…өйҡҠ) changed from "Gendarmerie" to "Military Police" for clarity and convention 
- "Panzy" changed to "Pansy" as there's not really any English-relevant reason to use a Z beyond SEO
- "Hybis" changes to "Hibis" to reflect the "hibiscus" origin
- "Nemophy" changed to "Nemophi" to reflect the "nemophila" origin  
- "Peral" changed to "Pelar" to reflect the "pelargonium" origin
 
**Thanks to:**

title: [Blasphemboys] The Land of Anger / Ikari no Daichi / жҖ’гӮҠгҒ®еӨ§ең° [WEB-Rip 480p, AVC, AAC] (Gakken Anime)
description:
![](https://i.imgur.com/0GPFrqG.gif)
RAW acquisition, encoding: WOWmd
Translation: Perevodildo
Editing: Paul Geromini
Quality checking: True Noobow Gamer

You won't find this show in any database or anime list website. That's because it's a "Gakken Anime" - an educational anime that was only distributed to schools and other government institutions in a limited number of copies. For that reason, the Gakken shows are effectively extinct now - very few were in circulation and barely anything of it was preserved. ~~Watch me carefully avoid saying "lost media."~~ Even this video was miraculously found by WOWmd on the [Science Film Museum site](https://www.kagakueizo.org/create/other/218/) of all places. "Science Film Museum" is also what the watermark on this video source says.
For that same reason, the video/audio quality is complete thrash, and I can almost guarantee you no better source will ever appear. I actually don't know why I made this sub. Maybe to spite the odds and preserve at least some of Gakken Anime, maybe for old times' sake. A rash decision in hindsight, because I was hoping to get it out of the way in 2вҖ“3 days, but ended up with a 1300-lines sub on which I worked for over a week, 300 of that were signs, so I also spent a whole day just typesetting (without motion tracking or any fancy stuff, of course :^). But not everything is so grim, because this movie is ~~eerily~~ pleasantly similar to my other obscure educational pet project from that era - [Manga Nihon Keizai Nyuumon](https://anidb.net/anime/6498) - the MC is a smartly-dressed office lady, voiced by [Takamori Yoshino](https://anidb.net/creator/3890), and the show is focused on Japan-US trade friction from a realistic perspective, ~~both have no chance of ever getting licensed or remastered and were lost at one point~~. It actually did feel like one long episode of MNKN.
According to the Science Film Museum, the movie supposedly came out in 1987, but in it, they look at samples from June 1988, so it has to be after that, yet they still refer to Germany as FRG, which means the unification hasn't happened yet, so it's likely 1988-89.
Surprisingly, TNG volunteered to QC this, undeterred by the terrible video and the fact he won't even be able to add this show to his MAL completed list. He agreed to QC the MNKN as wellвҖ”both him and WOWmd have a good eye for outlandish documentary shows. Kudos. I also roped Paul in for editing, hehe. 

TL notes: 
вҖў If you ever end up actually watching this, you might find yourself wondering, "Did this really happen? They must be nuts!" Well, from the extensive research I had to make while translating this, I can say with about 70% confidence that this movie is more or less accurate in depicting the scale of the anti-rice almost racist propaganda campaign that was carried out from 1955 on. It actually happened, but in the true Japanese fashion, the Japanese decided to tone it down, whitewash, or simply hush it up as time went on. For instance, the propaganda film "Itachikko" (translates to "Weasel Child"), that they briefly retold in the movie, became controversial at one point, and now it's probably gone off the face of the earth entirely. I could only find a few [articles](https://ameblo.jp/dest2737kuu/entry-11852686052.html?utm_source=gamp&utm_medium=ameba&utm_content=general__dest2737kuu&utm_campaign=gamp_recentImageEntry) in Japanese, retelling someone's impressions of it (none of them were good). Come to think of it, it's crazy actually, how the Japanese always jump from one extremity (ricism) to another (this very movie, Ikari no Daichi) in an attempt to rectify their previous extremity, because Ikari no Daichi is also a propaganda movie of sorts, aimed at demonizing that another propaganda and the American inhumane corporatism as a whole. Live with it. 
вҖў Moreover, the American Train, however absurd it looks to us now, also [did actually exist](https://www.latimes.com/archives/la-xpm-1988-07-04-fi-4016-story.html) and travel through Japan in 1988. If this doesn't feel completely surreal yet, it will soon. 
вҖў "Kitchen cars" was the program, launched in Japan in 1955 by the Oregon Wheat Growers League to promote the consumption and imports from the USA of the surplus American food produce, at first, primarilyвҖ”wheat. Its goals were ideally aligned with Japan health ministryвҖҷs postwar campaign for nutritional improvement (eiyЕҚ kaizen), which had begun in earnest with passage of the 1952 Nutrition Improvement Act. 
TL;DR: kitchen cars taught the Japanese to eat less white rice and more oil and bread. [Further reading.](https://nagoya.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/31307/files/2020_Hopson_Kitchen_Cars.pdf) It's a fairly fascinating story, don't think any other anime covered it. There's actually even a whole "serious" documentary about it from 1978 by NHK: [NHKзү№йӣҶ-йЈҹеҚ“гҒ®гҒӢгҒ’гҒ®жҳҹжқЎж——пјҡзұігҒЁйәҰгҒ®жҲҰеҫҢеҸІ](https://www.dailymotion.com/video/x2fg9dq). 
вҖў "Kaya Okinobu" is actually an incorrect reading of [Kaya Okinori](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Okinori_Kaya)'s name. 
вҖў "A man named Baum" refers to [Richard K. Baum](https://www.uswheat.org/wheatletter/a-legacy-of-commitment-western-wheat-associates-develops-asian-markets/), the first president of the Western Wheat Associates. That man interviewed by NHK in the movie might as well be him too.
вҖў MSA Wheat Import AgreementвҖ”the movie gives a rather confusing explanation, basically, the US would send $50 million's worth of wheat to Japan, but instead of paying for it to the US, the Japanese govt. would pay 80% of it in yen to the US troops stationed there (as their salary), and the remaining 20% would come for free as a bonus. Yes, the US was _that_ desperate to get rid of the wheat surplus in those days. [Further reading](https://www.city.sukumo.kochi.jp/sisi/107401.html#:~:text=%EF%BC%AD%EF%BC%B3%EF%BC%A1%E5%B0%8F%E9%BA%A6%E8%B3%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%8D%94%E5%AE%9A%E3%81%A7%E3%81%AF,%E3%81%9D%E3%82%8C%E3%82%92%E3%81%86%E3%81%91%E3%81%A6%E3%80%81%E6%B3%95%E5%BE%8B).
вҖў Beef-Orange issueвҖ”in 1988, as part of the ongoing trade frictions, the US demanded Japan to liberalize the Beef and Oranges imports. "Beef Orange issue" was the colloquial name given to these negotiations. [Further reading](https://media.rakuten-sec.net/articles/-/45515).
вҖў Noboru and Ron, who met to resolve the Beef-Orange issue, are Noboru Takeshita, Japan's prime minister, and Ronald Reagan. Their whimsical and silly demeanor in that scene serves to parody the phoniness of their actual meeting, in which they [did address each other by first names](https://web.archive.org/web/20180130154417/https://www.nytimes.com/1988/01/16/opinion/ron-and-noboru-a-good-start.html).
вҖў Let's build a rice fieldвҖ”I actually have no idea what this refers to. The context makes it sound like some folk song or a proverb, except there isn't one of such name.

title: [DB] Tokyo Revengers (Season 1+2+3) (Uncensored) [Dual Audio 10bit BD1080p][HEVC-x265] (Batch) (Tokyo Revengers+Seiya Kessen-hen+Tenjiku-hen)
description:
Tokyo Revengers complete as of November 2024

Synopsis

Takemichi Hanagaki's second year of middle school was the highest point in his life. He had respect, a gang of friends he could count on, and even a girlfriend. But that was twelve years ago. Today, he's a nobody: a washed-up nonentity made fun of by children and always forced to apologize to his younger boss. A sudden news report on the Tokyo Manji Gang's cruel murder of the only girlfriend he ever had alongside her brother only adds insult to injury. Half a second before a train ends his pitiful life for good, Takemichi flashes back to that same day 12 years ago, when he was still dating Hinata Tachibana.

After being forced to relive the very same day that began his downward spiral, Takemichi meets Hinata's younger brother. Without thinking, he admits to his seeming death before flashing back to the past. Takemichi urges him to protect his sister before inexplicably returning to the future. Miraculously, he is not dead. Stranger still, the future has changed. It seems as though Takemichi can alter the flow of time. Given the chance to prevent his ex-girlfriend's tragic death at the hands of the Tokyo Manji Gang, Takemichi decides to fly through time to change the course of the future.

title: [spo0n] Dragon Ball Z Movie 8 - Broly The Legendary Super Saiyan [R2FR DVD Remux] [Dual Audio]
description:
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/tP5V8eN.png)

### The Re-Up
If you are wondering why this was re-uploaded so fast, it came to my attention I accidentally sent out an incomplete file
to my uploader and the movie would stop at 01:08:10. This has been fixed and the torrent now has the complete movie.
If you downloaded the older one, please delete and download this one

### *WHAT'S UP MY FELLAS*
You are probably wondering why some random person is coming out of nowhere with one of the most wanted DB release.
Reason is autism. Anyways I did Broly because it's the most popular Z movie, and thankfully one of 6 with a decent source.
This release is far from perfect and you could nitpick it to death but the people will receive what the people want.

### Video
| Source | Resolution | DAR | Scan Type | FPS | Format | Provided by |
| :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |
| FRDVD* | 720x576 | 4:3 | Progessive | 23.976* | MPEG-2 | Venny |

###### * 2008 AB Groupe Remastered DVD
###### * Time-Stretched to 23.976 in MKVToolNix


### Audio
| Language |  Source | Source Media | Channels | Format | Provided by | Synced by |
| :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |
| JPN | 2018 Toei Remaster | JPBD | Mono | FLAC | Team-Mirolo | Team-Mirolo |
| ENG | 2009 5.1 FUNi вҖңRemasteredвҖқ Dub (Kikuchi Score) | Remastered USBD | 5.1 Surround | FLAC | Fred Flanders | spo0n |
| ENG | 2009 5.1 FUNi вҖңRemasteredвҖқ Dub (Menza Score) | Remastered USBD | 5.1 Surround | FLAC | Fred Flanders | spo0n |
| ENG | 2007 5.1 Original FUNi Dub | Test USBD | 5.1 Surround | FLAC | Krycek7o2 | spo0n |
| ENG | 2007 2.0 Original FUNi Dub | Test USBD | Stereo | FLAC | Krycek7o2 | spo0n |
| ENG | 2001 AB Groupe "Big Green" Dub | NLDVD | Stereo | FLAC | SoM | iKaos / spo0n |
| ENG | Speedy Video Dub | VCD | Stereo | FLAC | SoM | Alperen / spo0n |
| ZXX | Laserdisc Isolated Score | Laserdisc | Mono | FLAC | SoM | Deli / spo0n |

### Subtitles
| Language | Style | Format | Provided by| Timing by | Styled by |
| :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |
| ENG | Stylized OP/ED, OP Credits, Signs, Titles, and Dialogue | ASS |SoM | spo0n / ZeBenko | spo0n / ZeBenko |
| ENG | OP/ED, OP Credits, Signs, and Titles | ASS | SoM | spo0n / ZeBenko | spo0n / ZeBenko |
| ENG | OP Credits, Signs, and Titles | ASS | SoM | spo0n / ZeBenko | spo0n / ZeBenko |
| ENG | Basic Subtitles | SRT | SoM | spo0n | - |
| ENG | English Dubtitles | ASS | SoM | spo0n | spo0n / ZeBenko |
| JPN | Japanese Subtitles | ASS | SoM | spo0n | iKaos |


### Very Important Questions
**Q:** ***вҖңOMG R U GONNA DO ALLLL THE MOVIES 4:3?вҖқ***
**A:**  No, Bottom line is that all 4:3 releases of these movies are entirely shit, Even if you filter the FUNi singles to no end they'll be still be terrible. Even this one suffers from [poor encoding](https://slow.pics/c/tY1rbgoe?image-fit=contain). I am considering doing either Z M1 or the rest of the Broly movies from the FRDVDs but do NOT count on it.

**Q:** **"bro who r u"**
**A:** the stinkest girl you'll ever meet.

### Contact
If you have any problems with this release, contact me on Discord
Discord: spo0n.

If you'd like to check out my other works or just see me ramble, Follow my [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/thespo0nshow.bsky.social)

### Special Thanks
SoM for their continued efforts to making the highest quality DB releases
The DB Dubs crew for helping out a bunch with this release
Kaleen for being there for emotional support
Some Rando for doing nothing
and maytrixbroly for having broly in her name

title: [еҢ—е®ҮжІ»еӯ—е№•з»„] ең°гҖӮ-е…ідәҺең°зҗғзҡ„иҝҗеҠЁ- / Chi. Chikyuu no Undou ni Tsuite [09][WebRip][HEVC_AAC][з®Җз№Ғж—ҘеҶ…е°Ғ]
description:
![chi](https://p.inari.site/kitauji/202410/07/chi.png)

***
**дёәдәҶжӮЁзҡ„ж’ӯж”ҫиғҪжӯЈзЎ®жҳҫзӨәеӯ—е№•ж•ҲжһңпјҢжҲ‘д»¬жҺЁиҚҗжӮЁи§ӮзңӢеҶ…е°ҒжәҗдҪҝз”Ё [MPV ж’ӯж”ҫеҷЁ](https://github.com/hooke007/MPV_lazy/releases)пјҢжҲ–иҖ…жҢӮиҪҪ [XySubFilter with libassеӯ—е№•ж»Өй•ң](https://github.com/Masaiki/xy-VSFilter/releases)гҖӮ**
**еҰӮжңүйңҖжұӮпјҢеҸҜеүҚеҫҖеҢ—е®ҮжІ»еӯ—е№•з»„зҡ„[еӯ—е№•д»“еә“](https://github.com/Kitauji-Sub)дёӢиҪҪеҫҖжңҹеҲ¶дҪңзҡ„еӨ–жҢӮеӯ—е№•гҖӮ**
### еҢ—е®ҮжІ»еӯ—е№•з»„*жӢӣеӢҹ
**зҝ»иҜ‘** | ж—ҘиҜӯеҸӮиҖғзӯүзә§n2д»ҘдёҠжҲ–иғҪеӨҹеҗ¬жҮӮз”ҹиӮүеҶ…е®№е№¶дҝқиҜҒжӯЈзЎ®зҺҮпјҢжңүз»ҸйӘҢиҖ…дјҳе…Ҳ
**ж ЎеҜ№** | ж—ҘиҜӯеҸӮиҖғзӯүзә§n1пјҢе–„дәҺеҸ‘зҺ°зҝ»иҜ‘зҡ„й”ҷиҜҜ
**зҫҺе·Ҙ** | зҶҹз»ғдҪҝз”ЁPS/AIзӯүиҪҜд»¶пјҢиғҪиҝӣиЎҢеӣҫзүҮи®ҫи®Ў
**ж—¶иҪҙ** | зҶҹз»ғдҪҝз”ЁAegжү“иҪҙ/ж ЎиҪҙе№¶и®ҫзҪ®еҗҲйҖӮзҡ„ж ·ејҸгҖҒеӯ—дҪ“жҲ–еұҸе№•еӯ—
**еҲҶжөҒ** | з”өи„‘/NASиғҪй•ҝж—¶й—ҙејҖжңәпјҢжңүи¶іеӨҹзҡ„з©әй—ҙе’ҢдёҠиЎҢеёҰе®Ҫдё”иҮіе°‘е…·еӨҮipv6е…¬зҪ‘пјҢдёәз»„еҶ…иө„жәҗеҲҶжөҒ
**жңүж„ҸиҖ…еҠ зҫӨпјҡжӢӣеӢҹзҫӨпјҲ[232487445](https://jq.qq.com/?k=NWmvNiOQ)пјүдәӨжөҒзҫӨпјҲ[713548082](https://jq.qq.com/?k=dGxiOqRR)пјүTGзҫӨпјҲ[@KitaUji](https://t.me/KitaUji)пјү**
![img](https://p.inari.site/guest/23-02/06/63e0ffef840de.webp)

**зҝ»иҜ‘** | ж—ҘиҜӯеҸӮиҖғзӯүзә§n2д»ҘдёҠжҲ–иғҪеӨҹеҗ¬жҮӮз”ҹиӮүеҶ…е®№е№¶дҝқиҜҒжӯЈзЎ®зҺҮпјҢжңүз»ҸйӘҢиҖ…дјҳе…Ҳ
**ж ЎеҜ№** | ж—ҘиҜӯеҸӮиҖғзӯүзә§n1пјҢе–„дәҺеҸ‘зҺ°зҝ»иҜ‘зҡ„й”ҷиҜҜ
**зҫҺе·Ҙ** | зҶҹз»ғдҪҝз”ЁPS/AIзӯүиҪҜд»¶пјҢиғҪиҝӣиЎҢеӣҫзүҮи®ҫи®Ў
**ж—¶иҪҙ** | зҶҹз»ғдҪҝз”ЁAegжү“иҪҙ/ж ЎиҪҙе№¶и®ҫзҪ®еҗҲйҖӮзҡ„ж ·ејҸгҖҒеӯ—дҪ“жҲ–еұҸе№•еӯ—
**еҲҶжөҒ** | з”өи„‘/NASиғҪй•ҝж—¶й—ҙејҖжңәпјҢжңүи¶іеӨҹзҡ„з©әй—ҙе’ҢдёҠиЎҢеёҰе®Ҫдё”иҮіе°‘е…·еӨҮipv6е…¬зҪ‘пјҢдёәз»„еҶ…иө„жәҗеҲҶжөҒ
**жңүж„ҸиҖ…еҠ зҫӨпјҡжӢӣеӢҹзҫӨпјҲ[232487445](https://jq.qq.com/?k=NWmvNiOQ)пјүдәӨжөҒзҫӨпјҲ[713548082](https://jq.qq.com/?k=dGxiOqRR)пјүTGзҫӨпјҲ[@KitaUji](https://t.me/KitaUji)пјү**
